title: JumpingMobs
description: The mod allows mobs to jump over pits, holes, ravines, and chasms, just like the player can! Using the configuration file, you can enable or disable jumping for specific mobs, as well as customize the jump length and cooldown for each mob.
body:
Mod for Minecraft Forge 1.16.5 that allows hostile mobs to jump over obstacles (pits, holes, chasms) like Steve (the player) to reach the player if there is no other logical path.

By default, mobs can jump no more than once every 5 seconds and cannot jump farther than 4 blocks.

The mod's settings allow you to:

1) Add/remove mobs from the list of those that can jump.

2) Configure jump distance and cooldown time for each mob.

3) Adjust other behavior parameters.
